prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-105 Motor circuits & disconnects within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.1 Power Distribution. The observed field condition is: missing lockable disconnect for maintenance. The work is being assessed at the in-service lifecycle state with source anchors NEC Art. 430.
title: T2 E-105 Fault diagnosis
